name: Cars.com Automotive Marketplace API
what_it_does: Cars.com automotive marketplace REST API for dealer inventory listing management, vehicle market data, and consumer automotive shopping experience integration. Enables AI agents to manage dealer vehicle inventory listing syndication and pricing updates for automotive listing management automation, handle consumer vehicle search and filtering for car shopping experience automation, access dealer ratings and review management for automotive reputation automation, retrieve vehicle deal rating and market comparison for consumer price transparency automation, manage dealer leads and contact form submissions for automotive lead management automation, handle vehicle history and transparency data for trust-based automotive experience automation, access Instant Cash Offer (used car valuation) for vehicle appraisal automation, retrieve dealer performance analytics and listing visibility metrics for dealer optimization automation, manage dealer website and Dealer Inspire integration for automotive digital presence automation, and integrate Cars.com with dealer management systems, CRM platforms, and third-party automotive tools for end-to-end marketplace management.
use_cases: Syndicating vehicle listings from dealer inventory automation agents
Managing dealer reviews from reputation automation agents
Generating consumer leads from automotive shopping agents
Analyzing listing performance from dealer analytics agents
best_when: An automotive dealer or dealer group wanting AI agents to automate inventory listing syndication, consumer lead management, dealer review responses, and Cars.com performance analytics across the Cars.com marketplace and Dealer Inspire digital retail platform.
avoid_when: DEALER SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED FOR LISTING API: Cars.com listing API access requires active dealer subscription; automated inventory syndication without active Cars.com dealer account creates API authentication failure and listing eligibility violation. DEALER INSPIRE WEBSITE SEPARATE API SURFACE: Cars.com acquired Dealer Inspire website platform; Dealer Inspire digital retailing (online payments, eSign) has separate API from Cars.com listing marketplace; automated workflows spanning Cars.com marketplace and Dealer Inspire website require managing separate API credentials. INSTANT CASH OFFER VALUE ACCURACY FOR TRADE COMMITMENT: Automated vehicle appraisal using Cars.com Instant Cash Offer must present ICO as soft offer requiring physical inspection; automated trade-in price commitment based on ICO before inspection creates trade value dispute when vehicle condition differs from consumer description.

auth.notes: Cars.com uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Cars.com founded 1998 (Chicago Tribune / Classified Ventures). Public (NYSE: CARS). Acquired Dealer Inspire 2018 (dealer websites and digital retailing). 4,000+ dealer customers. 30M+ monthly unique visitors. Vehicle listing, consumer reviews, Instant Cash Offer used car valuation. Deal Rating transparency tool. Competes with AutoTrader (Cox), CarGurus, and TrueCar for automotive marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — dealer subscription for listing access
pricing.paid_tiers: Dealer subscription by listing count and market tier; Dealer Inspire website subscription; featured listing and premium placement add-ons
pricing.notes: Chicago IL. NYSE: CARS. Founded 1998. 4,000+ dealer customers. Annual/monthly subscription by listing volume. Dealer Inspire digital retailing separately priced.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; listing and lead queries throttled; webhooks for lead events

known_agent_gotchas: DEALER INSPIRE SEPARATE API FROM CARS.COM MARKETPLACE: Cars.com marketplace listing API and Dealer Inspire website/digital retailing API are separate platforms with distinct credentials; automated workflows integrating both Cars.com listings and Dealer Inspire digital retailing must manage dual API integrations; unified Cars.com brand does not mean unified API

DEAL RATING CALCULATION FOR LISTING VISIBILITY: Cars.com Deal Rating algorithm affects listing visibility and consumer engagement; automated vehicle pricing must achieve Good Deal or Great Deal rating for optimal listing visibility; automated pricing above Cars.com deal threshold creates reduced listing exposure without dealer notification

INSTANT CASH OFFER CONDITIONED ON PHYSICAL INSPECTION: Cars.com Instant Cash Offer (ICO) is soft offer subject to physical inspection; automated consumer-facing trade valuation commitment based on ICO before inspection creates expectation mismatch; present ICO as estimate requiring in-person confirmation

CONSUMER REVIEW RESPONSE CONTENT POLICY: Automated dealer review responses via Cars.com API must comply with Cars.com community guidelines; automated review responses containing customer PII, litigation references, or policy violations create Cars.com content removal and dealer account flag

LISTING PRICING UPDATE LATENCY FOR CONSUMER DISPLAY: Cars.com listing price updates via API have processing delay before consumer-facing display update (minutes to hours); automated price change confirmation to consumer before Cars.com display update reflects change creates price inconsistency

LEAD SPAM FILTERING FOR AUTOMATED LEAD PROCESSING: Cars.com lead quality filtering may classify automated inquiry submissions as spam; automated lead generation testing using Cars.com search API without real consumer intent triggers Cars.com spam detection and IP rate limiting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Consumer vehicle shopping, dealer inventory, and lead data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Automotive marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Consumer PII, vehicle listing, and dealer lead data.
